name: api
description: REST API design and safety standards

observations.title: Validate all request input at the API boundary
facts: Use schema validation (Zod, Joi, JSON Schema)
Reject unknown fields to prevent mass assignment
Return 422 with field-level error details

observations.title: Always paginate list endpoints — never return unbounded results
facts: Default limit 20-50, max 100
Use cursor-based pagination for real-time data
Return total count and next cursor

observations.title: Use consistent error response format across all endpoints
facts: Include: status, error code (machine-readable), message (human-readable)
Optional: details array for validation errors
Document all possible error codes

observations.title: Rate limit all API endpoints
facts: Return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded
Use X-RateLimit-Limit and X-RateLimit-Remaining headers
Different limits for authenticated vs anonymous

observations.title: POST/PUT/PATCH must validate Content-Type header
facts: Reject requests without proper Content-Type
Accept: application/json for JSON APIs
Return 415 Unsupported Media Type for wrong types

observations.title: Implement idempotency for POST endpoints that create resources
facts: Use Idempotency-Key header
Prevent duplicate creation on retry
Critical for payment and order endpoints

observations.title: Set request size limits to prevent abuse
facts: Limit request body size (e.g., 1MB default)
Set separate limits for file uploads
Return 413 Payload Too Large when exceeded

observations.title: Include request ID in every response for traceability
facts: Generate UUID in middleware
Return as X-Request-Id header
Include in all log entries for the request

observations.title: Implement request timeouts on all outgoing calls
facts: Set connect timeout (5s) and read timeout (30s)
Use AbortController for fetch calls
Circuit breaker for frequently failing dependencies

observations.title: Soft delete resources — preserve data for audit and recovery
facts: Use deleted_at timestamp instead of hard DELETE
Filter soft-deleted records in all queries
Provide purge endpoint for permanent deletion (admin only)
